entities.name: Study Author(s)
entities.prompt: Extract the study author(s). If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Author Affiliations
entities.prompt: Extract the affiliations of the authors. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Study Title
entities.prompt: Extract the title of the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Publication Date
entities.prompt: Extract the publication date of the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Journal
entities.prompt: Extract the name of the journal where the study was published. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Test Material
entities.prompt: Extract the test material used in the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Test Animal Species
entities.prompt: Extract the species of the test animals. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Vehicle or solvent used
entities.prompt: Extract the vehicle or solvent used to administer the test material. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Negative Control
entities.prompt: Extract the negative control used in the study. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Route of Administration
entities.prompt: Extract the route of administration for the test material. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Dose Levels
entities.prompt: Extract the dose levels of the test material administered. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Frequency of Administration
entities.prompt: Extract the frequency of administration of the test material. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Duration of Dosing Period
entities.prompt: Extract the duration of the dosing period. If not reported, output "Not Reported."

entities.name: Results Presented
entities.prompt: Are there results presented? (Qualitative or quantitative?). If not reported, output "Not Reported."
